name: Secret Kiss Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter, sugar and vanilla at medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add flour and nuts on low speed until well-blended.
3. Chill dough for 2 hours.
4. For each cookie, use about 1 tablespoon of dough to encase one candy piece completely.
5. Place cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until set but not brown, about 8-10 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and roll in powdered sugar.
